title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, March 19 2024
summary:
Main
Bulkers : Capesize and Panamax bulk carrier values continue to firm, other vessels remain stable
Panamax BC Vitahorizon (74,500 DWT, Mar 2007, Hudong Zhonghua) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 12.50 mil, VV Value USD 12.26 mil
Handy BC Western London (39,300 DWT, Jan 2015, Jiangmen Nanyang) sold to unknown European buyers for USD 18.50 mil, VV Value USD 18.20 mil
Handy BC Western Panama (39,000 DWT, Jan 2015, Jiangmen Nanyang) sold to Vega Bulk Carriers for USD 18.50 mil, VV Value USD 18.20 mil
Tankers : Tanker values remained mostly stable last week, whilst older VLCC tonnage firmed
Aframax Seliger (115,100 DWT, Mar 2009, Sasebo) sold to Unknown Chinese buyers for USD 46 mil, VV Value USD 45.05 mil
MR2 (Chem/Prod) Glenda Melanie (47,200 DWT, Nov 2010, Hyundai Mipo) sold to Xingtong Shipping for USD 27.40 mil (DD Passed), VV Value USD 28.15 mil
Containers : Secondhand values appreciated across all ages and sizes driven by firmed earnings and tighter tonnage availability
Post Panamax Athenian, Athos & Aristomenis (9,954 TEU, Mar-April 2011, Samsung) sold to Peter Dohle in an en bloc deal for USD 153 mil (Inc TC), VV Value USD 163.39 mil
Image reference: assets/2024-03-19_week
